title: feat: allow configuring API root path

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat: add configurable route prefix support for Mastra Studio and Client
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: supersedes — merged 2026-01-27, implements same feature as `apiPrefix` in ServerConfig

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat: Add studioBase for Mastra Studio
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: related — maintainer LekoArts referenced this when asking author to rename apiRootPath to apiBase

summary: Adds an `apiRootPath` config option to ServerConfig to allow customizing the API root path (default `/api`). Modifies auth middleware functions (canAccessPublicly, isProtectedPath, checkRules) and the Hono server setup to use the configurable path instead of hardcoded `/api`. The PR references issue #9674.
maintainerNotes: This PR has been fully superseded by PR #12295 (merged 2026-01-27) which added the `apiPrefix` option to ServerConfig, accomplishing the same goal. The codebase already has `apiPrefix` in `packages/core/src/server/types.ts` with full integration across the server, auth, playground, and deployer packages. Maintainer LekoArts commented on 2025-12-05 asking the author to rename `apiRootPath` to `apiBase`, but the author never responded and the feature was later implemented differently. The PR has merge conflicts and many CI checks stuck in PENDING state. Should be closed with a thank-you note pointing to the merged implementation.
